officeCosts.note: Rent, business rates, utilities, insurance, internet and PRS music licence. The 2025 P&L line totals £165,647; the model applies a flat +10% inflation to forecast 2026.
officeCosts.modelNote: Note: detailed line-item splits are not yet in the data layer. The 2025 total (£165,647) and the +10% inflation forecast are the figures driving the model — this breakdown is descriptive only.

rent.name: Rent
rent.note: Variable rent at 15% of quarterly turnover from August 2026 (3 months pre-paid May–Jul 2026). Scales with revenue; lower in a bear scenario, higher in a bull.

rates.name: Business Rates
rates.note: Southwark Council post-relief charge. Re-evaluated periodically by the council; treat as ~fixed year-on-year.

utilities.name: Utilities
utilities.note: Electricity, gas, water. Tracks footfall and trading hours; broadly variable with occupancy.

insurance.name: Insurance
insurance.note: Public liability, employer's liability, contents, business interruption. Annual premium, fixed once renewed.

internet.name: Internet & Phone
internet.note: Business broadband + line rental. Fixed monthly contract.

prs.name: PRS / Music Licence
prs.note: PPL/PRS for Music annual licence. Required for playing licensed music in the venue. Effectively fixed.

overview.forecastChart: Monthly Revenue & EBITDA Forecast · May 2026 – Apr 2027

performance2025.ticketSource: Borough 2025 · Online portal (actual) vs Office/till (imputed at list price)
performance2025.officeNote: Status = external · imputed at list price
performance2025.monthlyTicket: Monthly Ticket Revenue — Online + Office Stacked

costCategories.fixedDesc: Rent, rates, electricity, insurance, internet, PRS
costCategories.vatDesc: Net VAT paid to HMRC — VAT collected minus VAT reclaimed on purchases
costCategories.googleDesc: 2025 historical Lithos/Google spend · under new IP & Licensing model all ad/SEO spend sits with Plonk Golf from 2026

performance2026.sliderDesc: Aggregate of the five growth levers in Scenarios (Bar · Golf · Events · Hires · Pool). Preset buttons snap all five to the same value. Wages +10%, Fixed +10%, Drinks = 30% of bar, Hosting fixed, Service Charge tracks the average, everything else scales.

costNotes.wagesDriven: Driven by the wage calculator below — sliders control the rate per role × 2026 hours
costNotes.fixed: Rent, rates, utilities, insurance, internet, PRS · +10% on 2025
costNotes.arcades: Operator cost = sum of (tokens × volume) across all SKUs × £0.325. Lower per-SKU tokens in the Ticket Price Maker below to cut this.
costNotes.vatComputed: Output VAT (revenue × 1/6) − reclaimed Input VAT — wages, arcades, food and hosting are zero-rated
costNotes.hostingNote: Fixed — SEO/Ads now owned by Plonk Golf

scenarios.leverNote: These four levers also drive the main 2026 Performance slider

priceMaker.header: Ticket Price Maker · Per-SKU Unit Economics
priceMaker.note: Edit price and tokens per SKU. Cost per ticket = 16% rent/bills allocation + 20% VAT + tokens × £0.325. Volumes scale with the golf ticket lever above. Token totals flow back to the Arcades cost line.
priceMaker.linkNote: Total token cost flows to the Arcades line in the cost donut. Changing tokens here moves EBITDA in real time. Income lines still come from the growth levers — matrix revenue is shown for unit-economics insight, not yet a live override.
